name: Mandiant Attack Surface Management
description: Google Cloud-backed attack surface management providing automated external asset discovery, vulnerability detection, and exposure monitoring with threat intelligence enrichment

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: Retrieve discovered external assets including hosts, domains, IP ranges, and web applications

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by asset type (host, domain, ip_range, web_app, certificate)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset including services, technologies, and risk assessment

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: Retrieve security issues and exposures identified across the attack surface

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by issue status (open, resolved, accepted)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: List Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Retrieve vulnerabilities detected on external assets with threat intelligence context

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: List Collections
actions.description: Retrieve the list of data collections available in the ASM workspace

actions.name: Get Collection Netblocks
actions.description: Retrieve network blocks discovered in a specific collection

actions.name: Search Domains
actions.description: Search for discovered domains and subdomains in the attack surface

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Set to 'domain' to filter for domain assets

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for domain name matching
